description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and fragmented representation of a human adult, with elongated and stretched surfaces that do not resemble natural human proportions. The form is abstract, with sharp, angular planes and thin, rod-like extensions protruding in various directions. There is a suggestion of a torso-like mass, but the limbs and head are not clearly defined, making it difficult to discern any realistic anatomical features. The surface texture is smooth and the coloration is predominantly brown with some lighter and darker areas, possibly mimicking clothing or skin. The overall structure is sparse, with large gaps and disconnected elements, giving it an almost skeletal or wireframe appearance. This object does not convey the typical visual cues of a pedestrian adult and lacks recognizable clothing or accessories.
description: A highly abstract, fragmented adult human form with elongated, angular surfaces and thin protruding rods, lacking clear anatomical features. The object is mostly brown and appears smooth but is visually sparse and disconnected.
description_view_0: Angular, brown surfaces and thin rods are visible, with a large, flat plane suggesting a torso-like area.
description_view_1: Almost entirely empty space, with no discernible features visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Sparse, thin lines and rods are faintly visible, with little solid form present.
description_view_3: A distorted, angular mass with several thin rods extending outward, showing the most complex structure of all views.
attribute_clothing_type: indeterminate due to abstraction and distortion
